overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting exploration of an ancient Greek temple treasury. The player character approaches the stone temple entrance, passes through the interior containing a large seated statue, and emerges onto a scenic terrace overlooking a coastal town before returning to the front facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone steps leading to ancient temple entrance

events.description: guard NPC appears silhouetted at the temple entrance doorway

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone steps toward the temple entrance flanked by potted trees

notable_agents.action: standing guard at the temple entrance wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: large stone temple facade with tall columns and hanging cream-colored banners
wide staircase made of large stone blocks leading up to the entrance
tall rugged mountain rock face rising beside the temple structure
large terracotta planters containing mature olive trees flanking the steps

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of an ancient stone temple entrance set against a rocky cliff. The camera approaches up wide stone steps lined with potted olive trees and decorative banners. A guard NPC appears silhouetted in the doorway as the character nears the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior treasury chamber with central cult statue

events.description: entering the shaded interior of the treasury through the large decorated doorway
passing by the guard NPC standing to the right inside the entrance
exiting the treasury through the rear doorway to the bright terrace overlook

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple interior past the guard and circling the large central statue

notable_agents.action: standing guard inside the treasury entrance wearing blue tunic and gold armor

entered.detail: large painted marble statue of a robed female figure holding a golden staff, seated on a raised platform
ancient painted murals depicting figures in classical style on the stone walls
large terracotta urns and pottery vessels placed on the floor around the statue
decorative stone lattice windows allowing patterned light to enter the chamber

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dimly lit treasury interior, passing a guard in blue and gold armor. The space features a large central statue of a seated female figure with a staff, surrounded by clay urns and ancient wall murals. Light filters through decorative lattice windows before the character exits to the bright exterior terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: open stone terrace with coastal overlook and braziers

events.description: emerging from shadow into bright sunlight revealing the expansive sea view

agents.ego_description: walking along the irregular stone pavement of the terrace toward the overlook edge

entered.detail: open terrace paved with irregular flagstones and scattered with flower petals
lit stone fire braziers on pedestals flanking the terrace path
distant view of an ancient settlement cascading down hillsides toward a blue harbor
life-sized bronze statue of a male figure standing on a pedestal

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the treasury, the scene opens onto a sunlit stone terrace with lit braziers and scattered flower petals. The camera walks past a bronze statue toward the terrace edge, revealing a stunning view of a coastal town and blue harbor in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace edge with offering shrine and panoramic coastal view

events.description: stopping at the terrace edge to pan across the detailed view of the coastal settlement below

agents.ego_description: walking to the terrace edge then panning slowly to observe the coastal town and surrounding landscape

entered.detail: stone altar table decorated with garlands, flowers, and ritual offerings
low stone wall marking the edge of the terrace overlook

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the terrace edge where an offering shrine decorated with flowers stands near a bronze statue. The camera pans across the panoramic view of the coastal town built on terraced hillsides descending to a bright blue harbor, with mountains visible in the hazy distance.

events.description: turning back toward the temple entrance after viewing the overlook

agents.ego_description: walking back around the temple terrace toward the front columned entrance

entered.detail: front facade of the temple featuring tall fluted columns and red hanging banners

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the coastal view and walks back toward the temple's front facade, passing the bronze statue again. The segment ends with a view of the temple's columned entrance with its red banners, set against the rocky cliff face.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the imposing exterior of an ancient stone temple, through its shadowed interior, and out onto a panoramic coastal terrace before returning to the start. It begins by ascending wide stone steps lined with olive trees and banners toward a silhouetted guard in the doorway. As the camera enters the dimly lit treasury, the scene shifts to an interior filled with clay urns, wall murals, and a large seated statue, with light filtering through lattice windows before the character emerges into the bright exterior. The view then expands onto a sunlit terrace with lit braziers and flower petals, moving past a bronze statue to reveal a sweeping vista of a coastal town and blue harbor nestled against hazy mountains. Finally, the camera turns away from the horizon and retreats back toward the temple's columned facade and red banners set against the rocky cliff.
